final:
module parallel_load_register(
    input       clk,
    input       rst,
    input       load,
    input  [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            data_out <= 8'b00000000;
        end
        else if (load) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end
    end

endmodule
